title: Villager translator
description: Mod, that adds a villager translator!
body:
##  Can you communicate in the languages ​​of villagers? 
No? No problem! Because "Villager translator mod" will translate for you all the phrases and remarks that villagers say!
# Why Villager translator?
The villagers are cool, funny, and also very... stupid :)      !
                                                                   ![Ahaha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c6c9d66ffd7d2547e9f79d62ab70a0f9bdb4f4.png)
# The mod has localization!
### The mod is currently available in only 2 languages: 
English (original) --> 100% of the mod's content is translated;
Russian --> 85% of the mod's content is translated.
# Inspired by:
Deepl translate
# [RU] Join our telegram channel!
## [Click!](https://t.me/fandompoppyplaytime)
